name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: A guaranteed pension scheme for unorganized sector workers

additional_rules: Must have a savings bank account
Should not be a member of any statutory social security scheme

benefit_description: Guaranteed minimum monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 (up to ₹60,000/year) after age 60

deep_eligibility_questions.question: Are you already a member of EPF or any other statutory social security scheme?
